## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like.
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Use Case

Describe your use case and how this feature would be used.

```r
# Example of how the feature might be used
library(dbplot)
library(dplyr)

# Proposed API or usage
data |>
  new_feature(...)
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Database Compatibility

Which database systems should this feature support?
- [ ] All databases (generic dplyr/dbplyr implementation)
- [ ] SQLite
- [ ] PostgreSQL
- [ ] SQL Server
- [ ] Oracle
- [ ] Spark
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Implementation Considerations

Are there any potential challenges or considerations for implementing this feature?
- Performance implications?
- Breaking changes?
- Documentation needs?
